title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个充满童趣和手工温暖的场景，适合用于亲子活动宣传、儿童教育产品推广或家庭旅游杂志封面等中文营销场景。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个充满童趣和手工温暖的场景，适合用于亲子活动宣传、儿童教育产品推广或家庭旅游杂志封面等中文营销场景。
prompt_original: Create an ultra-charming 3:4 editorial illustration of a five-year-old child sitting at a cozy craft table, happily building a handmade Play-Doh miniature [City Name]. The entire world must clearly look sculpted by a real child using colorful Play-Doh clay - soft rounded shapes, uneven geometry, tiny fingerprints, squished textures, slightly crooked buildings, playful proportions, imperfect symmetry, and adorable handcrafted charm. The miniature city should include recognizable landmarks, bridges, rivers, cafés, food stalls, apartment buildings, parks, trains, buses, tiny clay people, trees, clouds, and playful neighborhood scenes. Dense with delightful micro-details while remaining organized and cozy. The child should feel authentic and natural, wearing casual everyday clothing with a curious, proud expression. Avoid stereotypes or costume-like styling. Visual style: premium children’s editorial illustration, soft claymation-inspired rendering, miniature diorama photography mood, whimsical storytelling, high-end family travel magazine aesthetic, ultra detailed, handcrafted warmth. Lighting & color: bright neutral daylight, soft diffused natural indoor lighting, airy Scandinavian editorial mood, crisp whites, fresh pastel Play-Doh palette, slightly cool-neutral white balance, clean highlights, luminous soft shadows. Avoid yellow tint, orange cast, sepia tone, moody cinematic lighting, neon oversaturation, or dark shadows. The city must feel genuinely handmade by a talented five-year-old - playful, imperfect, emotional, and imaginative, never like professional miniature modeling or hyperreal sculpture. No fake text, logos, watermarks, AI artifacts, hyperreal architecture, or over-polished miniature aesthetics. Bottom-right corner: small handwritten white crayon sentence: Let’s play in [City Name] The handwriting should feel naturally childlike, cute, uneven, and readable.
prompt_zh: 创建一个超迷人的3:4编辑插图，描绘一个五岁的小孩坐在舒适的工艺桌旁，快乐地用彩色的培乐多黏土手工制作一个微型[城市名]。整个世界必须明显看起来是由一个真正的孩子用彩色的培乐多黏土雕塑而成——柔软的圆润形状、不规则的几何形状、小小的指纹、压扁的纹理、稍微歪斜的建筑、有趣的尺寸比例、不完美的对称性以及可爱的纯手工魅力。这个微型城市应包括可识别的地标、桥梁、河流、咖啡馆、小吃摊、公寓楼、公园、火车、公交车、小黏土人、树木、云朵和充满趣味的邻里场景。细节丰富但依然保持整洁舒适。孩子应该看起来真实自然，穿着日常休闲服装，表情好奇而自豪。避免使用刻板印象或戏剧化的造型。视觉风格：高端儿童编辑插图，灵感来自软陶动画的渲染，微型立体模型摄影氛围，富有想象力的故事讲述，高端家庭旅行杂志的美学，超精细的手工温暖。光线与色彩：明亮中性的日光，柔和散射的自然室内光线，清新的斯堪的纳维亚编辑风格，干净的白色，清新的培乐多彩色调，略微偏冷的中性白平衡，干净的高光，柔和的阴影。避免黄色色调、橙色色偏、棕褐色调、电影般的昏暗光线、霓虹灯过度饱和或深色阴影。这座城市必须感觉是由一个有天赋的五岁孩子亲手制作的——充满玩趣、不完美、情感丰富且富有想象力，绝不是专业的微缩模型或超现实雕塑。没有假文字、标志、水印、AI伪影、超现实建筑或过度修饰的微缩美学。右下角：一小段用白色蜡笔手写的句子：让我们在[城市名]玩耍。字体应该自然童真、可爱、不均匀且可读。
